allow: Bash(C:/Users/Mariam/anaconda3/envs/spotify-recommender/python.exe -c "import pyspark; print\('pyspark', pyspark.__version__\); import pyspark.find_spark_home as f; print\(f.find_spark_home\(\)\)")

PowerShell($ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://github.com/cdarlint/winutils/raw/master/hadoop-3.3.5/bin/hadoop.dll' -OutFile 'C:\\hadoop\\bin\\hadoop.dll' -UseBasicParsing; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://github.com/cdarlint/winutils/raw/master/hadoop-3.3.5/bin/winutils.exe' -OutFile 'C:\\hadoop\\bin\\winutils.exe' -UseBasicParsing; Get-ChildItem C:\\hadoop\\bin\\ | Where-Object { $_.Name -in 'hadoop.dll','winutils.exe' } | Format-Table Name, Length)

PowerShell($dll = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('C:\\hadoop\\bin\\hadoop.dll'\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($dll\); if \($text -match 'access0'\) { 'access0 symbol: PRESENT' } else { 'access0 symbol: MISSING' }; & 'C:\\hadoop\\bin\\winutils.exe' systeminfo 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 3)

Bash(awk -F',' 'NR>1 && NR<10000 && $4+0>0 {if\($4<min||min==""\)min=$4; if\($4>max\)max=$4} END{print "DS1 genres_v2 \(col4 duration_ms\):", "min="min, "max="max}' "D:/Projects/spotify-music-recommender/data/raw/dataset_of_songs/genres_v2.csv")

Bash(awk -F',' 'NR>1 && NR<10000 && $17+0>0 {if\($17<min||min==""\)min=$17; if\($17>max\)max=$17} END{print "DS1 genres_v2 \(col17 duration_ms\):", "min="min, "max="max}' "D:/Projects/spotify-music-recommender/data/raw/dataset_of_songs/genres_v2.csv")
